records.ety: [OE. satisfaccioun, F. satisfaction, fr. L. satisfactio, fr. satisfacere to satisfy. See Satisfy.]

defs: The act of satisfying, or the state of being satisfied; gratification of desire; contentment in possession and enjoyment; repose of mind resulting from compliance with its desires or demands.
quotes: The mind having a power to suspend the execution and satisfaction of any of its desires.

defs: Settlement of a claim, due, or demand; payment; indemnification; adequate compensation.
That which satisfies or gratifies; atonement.
quotes: Die he, or justice must; unless for him Some other, able, and as willing, pay The rigid satisfaction, death for death.
